user_prompt_preview:
Write one complete ASHA Worker Note for clinical domain Tuberculosis & Non-Communicable Diseases.

GENERATION LANGUAGE: English (Latin script) — this is an English pivot draft. A later pipeline stage will translate clinical prose into Bengali (code=bn, script=Bengali). Keep [[TYPE|value]] tags intact and valid.
ID-like tagged values stay Latin/digits. Drug names / labs stay untagged.

Persona anchors (must remain consistent; patient = this persona):
- sex / gender: Female
- age: 46
- marital_sta

Write one complete Telemedicine / Doctor-Patient Chat Transcript for clinical domain Psychiatry / Behavioral Health.

GENERATION LANGUAGE: English (Latin script) — this is an English pivot draft. A later pipeline stage will translate clinical prose into English (code=en, script=Latin). Keep [[TYPE|value]] tags intact and valid.
ID-like tagged values stay Latin/digits. Drug names / labs stay untagged.

PLACEMENT (device/network): Put IP_ADDRESS, URL, IMEI_NUMBER, and MAC_ADDRESS exactly once each

Write one complete ER Triage & Nursing Notes for clinical domain Maternal Health.

GENERATION LANGUAGE: English (Latin script) — this is an English pivot draft. A later pipeline stage will translate clinical prose into Gujarati (code=gu, script=Gujarati). Keep [[TYPE|value]] tags intact and valid.
ID-like tagged values stay Latin/digits. Drug names / labs stay untagged.

PLACEMENT (vehicle): Put VEHICLE_REGISTRATION exactly once in the arrival/RTA/ambulance line. Do not dump or repeat it.

Perso
